message:
fix(btree,connection): reformat freeblock coalescing and add Unix VFS beads-like integration test

Two changes:

1. **cursor.rs formatting** — rustfmt-driven reformatting of the freeblock
   coalescing logic in `BtCursor::deferred_delete_leaf_cell`. The
   `copy_from_slice` and `u16::try_from` blocks had inconsistent line
   breaks that diverged from the project's standard formatting. No
   behavioral change; purely whitespace normalization.

2. **connection.rs: new `test_forced_unix_backend_beads_like_create_flush_stays_sqlite_compatible`
   test** — exercises a full beads-like lifecycle (schema creation, issue
   insertion, metadata manipulation, dirty-issue tracking, export-hash
   recording, needs_flush flag toggle) through a forced `UnixVfs` pager
   backend, then verifies the resulting database passes SQLite's
   `PRAGMA integrity_check`. This catches any divergence between the
   Unix VFS pager path and SQLite's on-disk format expectations, which
   is critical because beads_rust always uses the Unix backend for its
   `.beads/beads.db` files.

   The test is gated behind `#[cfg(unix)]` since `UnixVfs` is not
   available on other platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -59853,6 +59853,8 @@ mod tests {
     use fsqlite_vdbe::ProgramBuilder;
     use fsqlite_vfs::MemoryVfs;
     use fsqlite_vfs::ShmRegion;
+    #[cfg(unix)]
+    use fsqlite_vfs::UnixVfs;
     use fsqlite_vfs::traits::{Vfs, VfsFile};
     use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet};
     use std::path::{Path, PathBuf};
@@ -61109,6 +61111,170 @@ mod tests {
         assert!(matches!(conn.pager, PagerBackend::Unix(_)));
     }
 
+    #[cfg(unix)]
+    #[test]
+    fn test_forced_unix_backend_beads_like_create_flush_stays_sqlite_compatible() {
+        let _serial = super::fsqlite_core_test_serializer();
+        let cx = Cx::new();
+        let dir = tempfile::tempdir().unwrap();
+        let db_path = dir.path().join("forced_unix_beads_like.db");
+        let db_str = db_path.to_string_lossy().into_owned();
+
+        let pager = Arc::new(
+            SimplePager::open_with_cx(&cx, UnixVfs::new(), &db_path, PageSize::DEFAULT)
+                .expect("open unix pager"),
+        );
+        let conn = Connection::open_with_env_and_pager(
+            db_str.clone(),
+            ConnectionEnv::default(),
+            PagerBackend::Unix(pager),
+        )
+        .expect("open forced-unix connection");
+
+        conn.execute("PRAGMA busy_timeout=5000;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE TABLE issues (
+                id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+                content_hash TEXT,
+                title TEXT NOT NULL,
+                status TEXT NOT NULL,
+                priority INTEGER NOT NULL,
+                issue_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+                created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
+                updated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
+                ephemeral INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+                pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
+                is_template INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
+            );",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE INDEX idx_issues_ready
+             ON issues(status, priority, created_at)
+             WHERE status = 'open'
+               AND ephemeral = 0
+               AND pinned = 0
+               AND is_template = 0;",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_issues_content_hash ON issues(content_hash);")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE TABLE metadata(
+                key TEXT NOT NULL,
+                value TEXT NOT NULL
+            );",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_metadata_key ON metadata(key);")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE TABLE dirty_issues(
+                issue_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+                marked_at TEXT NOT NULL
+            );",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_dirty_issues_marked_at ON dirty_issues(marked_at);")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE TABLE export_hashes(
+                issue_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+                content_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
+                exported_at TEXT NOT NULL
+            );",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "CREATE TABLE events(
+                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
+                issue_id TEXT NOT NULL,
+                event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
+                actor TEXT NOT NULL,
+                created_at TEXT NOT NULL
+            );",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("CREATE INDEX idx_events_issue ON events(issue_id);")
+            .unwrap();
+
+        conn.execute(
+            "INSERT INTO metadata(key, value) VALUES
+                ('project', 'forced-unix'),
+                ('last_import', '2026-04-13T08:30:00Z'),
+                ('last_export', '2026-04-13T08:30:00Z');",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+
+        conn.execute("BEGIN;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "INSERT INTO issues(
+                id, content_hash, title, status, priority, issue_type, created_at, updated_at,
+                ephemeral, pinned, is_template
+             ) VALUES (
+                'bd-001',
+                'seed-hash',
+                'trigger',
+                'open',
+                3,
+                'task',
+                '2026-04-13T08:31:00Z',
+                '2026-04-13T08:31:00Z',
+                0,
+                0,
+                0
+             );",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "INSERT INTO dirty_issues(issue_id, marked_at)
+             VALUES ('bd-001', '2026-04-13T08:31:00Z');",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "INSERT INTO events(issue_id, event_type, actor, created_at)
+             VALUES ('bd-001', 'created', 'tester', '2026-04-13T08:31:00Z');",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("DELETE FROM metadata WHERE key = 'needs_flush';")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("INSERT INTO metadata(key, value) VALUES ('needs_flush', 'true');")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("COMMIT;").unwrap();
+
+        conn.execute("BEGIN;").unwrap();
+        conn.execute("DELETE FROM export_hashes WHERE issue_id = 'bd-001';")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "INSERT INTO export_hashes(issue_id, content_hash, exported_at)
+             VALUES ('bd-001', 'seed-hash', '2026-04-13T08:31:01Z');",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("DELETE FROM dirty_issues WHERE issue_id = 'bd-001';")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("DELETE FROM metadata WHERE key = 'last_export';")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute(
+            "INSERT INTO metadata(key, value)
+             VALUES ('last_export', '2026-04-13T08:31:01Z');",
+        )
+        .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("DELETE FROM metadata WHERE key = 'needs_flush';")
+            .unwrap();
+        conn.execute("COMMIT;").unwrap();
+
+        conn.close().unwrap();
+
+        let sqlite = rusqlite::Connection::open(&db_path).unwrap();
+        let integrity_check: String = sqlite
+            .query_row("PRAGMA integrity_check;", [], |row| row.get(0))
+            .unwrap();
+        assert_eq!(
+            integrity_check, "ok",
+            "forced UnixVfs beads-like create+flush path must remain SQLite-compatible"
+        );
+    }
+
     #[test]
     fn test_prepared_statement_inherits_trace_id() {
         let conn = Connection::open(":memory:").unwrap();
